Text: At its meeting on 21 July 2022, the Committee, having been informed that the complainant can now submit a new asylum application in Sweden, given that the expulsion order against him has become time-barred, decided to discontinue the consideration of communication No. 955/2019 on the understanding that the complainant would be entitled to submit a new communication to the Committee in the event of a renewed risk of forcible removal from the State party’s territory.
